oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Saving the Blues - The Dream Lives On!
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Paterson, Dorothy
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 50 Number 3 (July 2023).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.Saving the Blues ~ The Dream Lives On!President/Executive Director Bird EndowmentIn May of this year, a dream came true for me. 2023 marks the 5-year anniversary of the dedication of the Laney Rickman Blue-throated Macaw Reserve and my first visit to see it first-hand. The Blue-throated Macaw is found only in one place on Earth: the Beni Savannas of Bolivia. I kept pinching myself that I was really there!Although I can never fill her shoes, I feel privileged to keep momentum going on her visionary work saving the critically endangered Blue-throated Macaw from extinction, and I am honored to continue the projects in partnership with Asociación Armonía, a wonderful non-profit organization dedicated to the conservation of birds and their natural habitat in Bolivia.fly overhead and heard noisy chicks chattering in the nest boxes on the reserve. Compounding these emotions was to learn that a record-breaking number of chicks were on their way to fledging for the 2023 breeding season!Click the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: AFA Watchbird; Vol. 50 No. 3 (2023): Watchbird July 2023; 14-18
